purpose: Scan stale mergeable PR branches and dispatch sync comments.

capability.description: Runtime capability slug whose sidecar state is loaded and updated.

permissions.name: gh
permissions.usage: Reads PRs, compares branches, and posts sync or stuck comments.

permissions.name: jq
permissions.usage: Filters PR JSON and builds next-state JSON.

success: auto-sync completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: auto-sync cannot return a valid canonical result
